events.title: Prompting for Coursework Planning
events.summary: A practical session on planning, feedback and reflection prompts.

events.title: AI Study Drop-in
events.summary: Bring a study task and get help choosing an appropriate AI-supported approach.
events.description: A short drop-in session for students who want to understand where AI can help and where they should avoid it.
events.author: Hosted by Digital Skills
whatToBring: Any relevant guidance from your unit
